revision.text: {{No ping|{{{1|Example}}}}} ([[User talk:{{{1|Example}}}|talk]] '''·''' [[Special:Contribs/{{{1|Example}}}|contribs]] '''·''' [[Special:DeletedContributions/{{{1|Example}}}|deleted]] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:AbuseLog|wpSearchUser={{urlencode:{{{1|Example}}}}}}} filter log] '''·''' [[sulutil:{{{1|Example}}}|SUL]] '''·''' [https://www.google.com/search?q={{urlencode:{{{1}}}}} Google]) '''•''' ([[Special:Block/{{{1|Example}}}|block]] · [{{fullurl:Special:Block/{{{1|Example}}}|wpAutoBlock=0&wpCreateAccount=0&wpExpiry=indefinite&wpReason=other&wpReason-other={{urlencode:{{((}}uw-ublock{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|{{!}}reason={{{reason}}}}}{{))}}}}}} soft] '''·''' '''[{{fullurl:Special:Block/{{{1|Example}}}|wpAutoBlock=0&wpCreateAccount=0&wpExpiry=indefinite&wpReason=other&wpReason-other={{uw-softerblock}}}} promo] · [{{fullurl:Special:Block/{{{1|Example}}}|wpAutoBlock=0&wpCreateAccount=0&wpExpiry=indefinite&wpReason=other&wpReason-other={{uw-causeblock}}}} cause] ·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Block/{{{1|Example}}}|wpAutoBlock=0&wpCreateAccount=0&wpExpiry=indefinite&wpReason=other&wpReason-other={{uw-botublock}}}} bot] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Block/{{{1|Example}}}|wpAutoBlock=1&wpCreateAccount=1&wpExpiry=indefinite&wpReason=other&wpReason-other={{urlencode:{{((}}uw-uhblock{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|{{!}}reason={{{reason}}}}}{{))}}}}}} hard] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Block/{{{1|Example}}}|wpAutoBlock=1&wpCreateAccount=1&wpExpiry=indefinite&wpReason=other&wpReason-other={{uw-spamublock}}}} spam] '''·''' [{{fullurl:Special:Block/{{{1|Example}}}|wpAutoBlock=1&wpCreateAccount=1&wpExpiry=indefinite&wpReason=other&wpReason-other={{uw-vaublock}}}} vandal]){{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
